allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add PDF recap section to admin prestation show page

Reuses the existing prestation_pdf route to display a PDF preview and download button when the prestation status is "terminé", matching the behavior already available in the user prestation view.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add priority UX for admin tables with working pagination

- Add dateLimiteExecution field to BonDeCommande with deadline helpers
- Add tab navigation \(Tous/Urgents/À programmer/En cours/Terminés\)
- Urgents tab shows only "à programmer" bons with non-effectuée or close deadline
  \(bons with scheduled prestations or already terminated are excluded\)
- Priority sorting and red/orange row highlighting
- Display deadline column with visual indicators
- Add dateLimiteExecution to bon de commande form and detail page
- Replace fake pagination with real client-side pagination \(15 rows/page\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
